modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: VoIP phone has no internet access and no dial tone.

full_description_text: The VoIP phone is not getting any internet connection. I can't make calls because there's no dial tone. This issue seems to be affecting the network connectivity, and it's unclear why it's happening.
short_description: VoIP phone has no internet access and no dial tone.
description: The VoIP phone is not getting any internet connection. I can't make calls because there's no dial tone. This issue seems to be affecting the network connectivity, and it's unclear why it's happening.
